title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Mahindra Lifespace - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Mahindra Lifespace - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Lifespace has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!
